200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, throws a dart at the enemy whose health has dropped below 30%. The dart deals damage equal to that done by the weapon’s critical hit. If the dart kills the target, throws another dart at a random enemy.

description 4/6

Once in a while, throws a dart at the enemy whose health has dropped below 28%. The dart deals damage equal to that done by the weapon’s critical hit. If the dart kills the target, throws another dart at a random enemy. If damage taken is greater than 45000, 35% of the damage is blocked and added as a bonus to the Legionnaire’s next attack. Also, covers two nearby allies with a shield that has durability of 25000.

description 6/6

Once in a while, throws a dart at the enemy whose health has dropped below 25%. The dart deals damage equal to that done by the weapon’s critical hit. If the dart kills the target, throws another dart at a random enemy. If damage taken is greater than 45000, 60% of the damage is blocked and added as a bonus to the Legionnaire’s next attack. Also, covers two nearby allies with a shield that has a durability of 38000. On death, stuns all enemies and pulls them into an area on the enemy side. The stun will last 1,5 sec longer if the enemies outnumber the allies during the pull. Activates once per battle.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Legionnaire throws 2 darts.

description 4/6

Legionnaire throws 2 darts. If the unit takes more than 45000 damage, the enhanced attack ignores 25% of the target’s armor.

description 6/6

Legionnaire throws 2 darts. If the unit takes more than 45000 damage, the enhanced attack ignores 25% of the target’s armor. When pulling enemies, increases the damage of all allies by 25% for 4 sec.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

When throwing a dart, the Legionnaire’s dodge increases by 50% for 4 sec.

description 4/6

When throwing a dart, the Legionnaire’s dodge increases by 50% for 4 sec. If the unit takes more than 45000 damage, increases the unit’s physical armor by 20% for 2 sec. Up to 4 effects.

description 6/6

When throwing a dart, the Legionnaire’s dodge increases by 50% for 4 sec. If the unit takes more than 45000 damage, increases the unit’s physical armor by 20% for 2 sec. Up to 4 effects. Once per battle, resurrects on death with 75% health.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

The dart disarms an enemy for 2 sec. The disarmed enemy is unable to use their weapon abilities during that period.

description 4/6

The dart disarms an enemy for 2 sec. The disarmed enemy is unable to use their weapon abilities during that period. Fighters shielded by the Legionnaire’s ability have their dodge increased by 50% for 5 sec.

description 6/6

The dart disarms an enemy for 2 sec. The disarmed enemy is unable to use their weapon abilities during that period. Fighters shielded by the Legionnaire’s ability have their dodge increased by 50% for 5 sec. When pulling enemies, increases damage done to stunned units by 30% for 3 sec.

Materials

Potion of Courage
Wig
